title: Fix a boundary (off-by-one) bug with a provided failing test
task: `npm test` currently fails: pagination math has a boundary bug in src/paginate.js. Fix the implementation so the whole suite passes. You must NOT modify test/paginate.test.js. Run the tests to verify.
notes: pageCount uses Math.floor and drops the partial last page; the file_contains pins keep the boundary assertions from being rewritten.
